on the floor and no back support. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for being able to safely move from lying on the bed to sitting on the side of the bed with feet flat on the floor and no back support. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 = Independent
07 = Patient refused
09 = Not applicable
10 = Not attempted due to
